tribe_description: This cluster is composed of hands-on, family-focused parents who buy and review products chiefly to keep their kids happily occupied while learning. Their writing is concise, experience-based, and balances enthusiasm with practical caveats—mirroring their stated characteristics that spotlight utility and child enjoyment over personal hobbyist depth.
tribe_definition: A tribe of practical kid-centric parents who buy with family needs, especially children, in mind. They generally prioritize everyday usefulness, children's needs.
population_definition: Gamers who evaluate video games, consoles, accessories, and entertainment products.

inherent_behavioral_traits.text: Balanced, concise review style citing both pros and cons
Focus on durability and device compatibility
Highlights children’s direct reactions and enjoyment
Willing to praise enthusiastically but critique candidly
Looks for hassle-free setup and maintenance

main.text: Keeping children entertained and learning simultaneously
Avoiding wasted money on low-value or short-lived items
Ensuring products work seamlessly across devices and controllers
Reducing parental stress during commutes, appointments, or family downtime
Facilitating enjoyable shared experiences (multiplayer, family movie time)

validation_triggers: Games or apps that combine fun with educational benefit
High build quality that survives rough child handling
Bundles or multi-packs that save money
Cross-platform or offline functionality that simplifies usage
Bright, appealing designs that excite kids
friction_points: Hidden or repeat costs (buying new starter packs, micro-transactions)
Lack of progressive difficulty or replay value
Poor material quality that rips, fades, or scratches easily
Items that are overly complex or too easy for the stated age range

implicit_goals.text: Find reliable, educational entertainment that occupies kids during daily routines
Stretch family budgets by selecting long-lasting, high-value products
Create positive shared experiences that strengthen family bonds

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a family-oriented, practicality-driven reviewer who gauges products by how durable they are under heavy use from multiple children and by how simple or low-effort the experience feels. Their reviews aim to guide other parents toward items that last over time and don’t demand much thought, emphasizing longevity, ease, and kid-friendliness over complex features or personal enthusiasm for the category.

category_characteristics.Software: This user is motivated by a preference for simplicity and low cognitive effort, evaluating software through the lens of how easy and minimally demanding it is to use or play. Their reviews are concise yet balanced—they acknowledge when a product is well-made for others, but focus on signaling mismatches with their own needs to guide like-minded consumers toward less involved alternatives.
category_characteristics.null: This user is primarily driven by a desire for low-effort, relaxing entertainment and evaluates products through the lens of cognitive load and simplicity. Their brief, straightforward reviews aim to signal whether an experience is overly complex or mentally demanding, helping like-minded casual users avoid options that require significant thought or involvement.
category_characteristics.Video Games: This reviewer is family-oriented and evaluates products through the lens of long-term durability under heavy, child-centric use. Their motivation is to assure other caregivers that an item will withstand years of wear and tear, so they focus on practical evidence of sturdiness rather than technical specs or aesthetics.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a practical, family-focused parent managing young children with chronic medical needs, so their reviews center on products that safely entertain kids during waiting periods and family time. They are strongly motivated by value-for-money and real-world usefulness, frequently noting cost savings, multi-pack deals, and compatibility across devices to help other caregivers make economical, stress-reducing choices.

category_characteristics.Software: This caregiving parent evaluates software through the lens of supporting young children during frequent medical appointments, prioritizing safe, age-appropriate content that reliably occupies and comforts their kids. Their reviews are empathetic and situational, aimed at helping other parents with similar challenges find trustworthy, distraction-providing apps.
category_characteristics.Appliances: This user is motivated by long-term cost savings and practical functionality, praising appliances that eliminate recurring expenses. Their reviews are concise and based on extended real-world use, aiming to reassure others about reliability and value without unnecessary detail.
category_characteristics.Video Games: This reviewer is a budget-conscious parent who prioritizes family fun and cost efficiency, frequently comparing bundle prices and noting cross-platform compatibility to stretch entertainment dollars. Their reviews are pragmatic and experience-based, written to help other parents find affordable, versatile options that keep their kids happy.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a practical, family-focused parent who reviews products based on how well they function across multiple devices, aid organization, and withstand everyday use. Their concise, matter-of-fact comments highlight reliability, compatibility, and durability, aiming to guide other caregivers toward hassle-free, value-oriented purchases.

category_characteristics.Software: This user is family-oriented and primarily motivated by practical functionality that supports their parenting needs; they focus on whether software reliably works across multiple devices so their child can access content anywhere. Their reviews are concise, positive endorsements aimed at reassuring other caregivers about ease of use and cross-platform reliability rather than offering detailed technical analysis.
category_characteristics.Video Games: This reviewer is primarily motivated by practical functionality and durability, emphasizing whether a product works as intended, looks acceptable, and will last over time. Their writing is concise and utilitarian, aimed at giving quick, no-nonsense confirmations that help others judge basic performance and organizational benefits.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a family-oriented parent who evaluates products through the lens of their child’s enjoyment and comfort. Their motivation is to share enthusiasm for playful, novel technology that enriches home life, resulting in short, upbeat endorsements emphasizing fun, innovation, and physical comfort.

category_characteristics.Video Games: This user is a family-oriented parent whose reviews are driven by their child’s enjoyment and the wonder of innovative, immersive technology. They write brief, enthusiastic endorsements that highlight how a product transforms everyday spaces into engaging, kid-friendly experiences, signaling a priority on fun and shared family moments over technical detail or cost analysis.
category_characteristics.Fashion: This user is primarily motivated by practical comfort, emphasizing how well an item meets basic functional needs like warmth and coziness. Their reviews are concise and often reference another person’s experience, suggesting they aim to provide quick, relatable reassurance rather than detailed analysis. Overall, they write straightforward, positive endorsements focused on everyday usability.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is motivated by practical value and family-centric usefulness, seeking affordable entertainment, educational content, and accessible tech products that will suit both themselves and their children. They write balanced, detail-rich reviews that break down mechanics, pros and cons, and audience suitability, reflecting an analytical mindset aimed at helping others make informed choices. Their tone shows a desire to share firsthand experiences and highlight real-world considerations such as cost, fit, and learning potential.

category_characteristics.Software: This reviewer is motivated by practicality and family-oriented value, offering balanced, detailed explanations of an app’s mechanics, required resources, and educational or entertainment payoff to help households judge fit. Their writing emphasizes free or low-cost alternatives, ease of use, and content that is engaging yet wholesome, revealing an analytic but approachable style aimed at guiding others rather than critiquing technical minutiae.
category_characteristics.Appliances: This reviewer is a conscientious, family-oriented shopper who gathers firsthand feedback (often from their child) and translates it into balanced, experience-based advice for other consumers. They value practical performance factors like battery life, comfort, and usability while also noting aesthetic appeal, aiming to present both strengths and drawbacks so readers can make informed purchase decisions.
category_characteristics.Video Games: This reviewer is driven by practicality and reliability, assessing whether a product performs as expected, integrates smoothly with existing hardware, and offers convenient extras like charging options. They provide balanced, detail-oriented feedback on fit, ergonomics, and potential issues, framing their insights to help others anticipate real-world use and suitability. Their writing suggests a consumer-helper mindset focused on ensuring hassle-free, functional experiences for themselves and the community.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is family-oriented and primarily motivated by finding entertainment that facilitates enjoyable shared experiences with their children. They balance warm enthusiasm with practical observations about technical performance, writing balanced reviews to help other parents understand both the fun factor and any usability issues.

category_characteristics.Software: This user is motivated by real-world usability and convenience, expressing enthusiasm when software becomes available on preferred devices and then assessing its practical performance. They provide balanced, concise feedback that highlights both positives and technical shortcomings, aiming to give peers a realistic expectation of reliability and potential issues.
category_characteristics.Video Games: This user is family-oriented and evaluates video games mainly through the lens of how enjoyable and age-appropriate they are for playing with children. Their reviews are concise, upbeat endorsements that highlight shared fun while briefly noting any issues that might disrupt the family experience. They write primarily to guide other parents toward wholesome, easy-to-enjoy titles that foster togetherness.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user writes reviews from a pragmatic, family-oriented perspective, emphasizing whether a purchase justifies its cost in terms of utility and the enjoyment it brings to their child. They pay close attention to platform compatibility and corporate practices that force additional spending, expressing mild sarcasm or frustration when value is compromised. Their purpose is to candidly inform others about hidden costs and overall fun, balancing critique with acknowledgment of worth when the product meets their family’s needs.

category_characteristics.Software: This user is highly utility-driven, judging software primarily by whether it delivers clear practical value. When an app fails to help them accomplish a task, they offer a terse, direct critique to register dissatisfaction and warn others. Their brevity and bluntness suggest a no-nonsense communication style focused on flagging shortcomings rather than elaborating on details.
category_characteristics.Video Games: This reviewer writes from a parent-centric perspective, prioritizing their child's enjoyment and the practical realities of which console gets used. They are motivated by value-for-money and hidden costs like needing a new starter pack, candidly calling out corporate limitations while still praising products that offer lasting, expandable fun. Their conversational, anecdotal tone suggests they aim to help other parents anticipate expenses and decide whether a game is worth repurchasing on another platform.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user appears to be a pragmatic, family-focused parent who gauges products by two main criteria: whether they effectively serve a specific learning purpose for themselves and whether they deliver immediate enjoyment for their children. Their reviews are brief and emotionally expressive, enthusiastically endorsing items that delight their kids or quickly critiquing those that miss an expected educational mark. They write chiefly to guide like-minded parents toward tools and games that are either genuinely helpful or instantly engaging.

category_characteristics.Software: This user is motivated by educational utility and personal engagement, quickly assessing whether a software tool meets their study needs and desired level of challenge. Their reviews combine brief critical observations about functionality (e.g., question difficulty, relevance to test prep) with strong, informal expressions of enthusiasm, suggesting an emotionally driven yet purpose-oriented reviewing style aimed at sharing immediate impressions rather than exhaustive analysis.
category_characteristics.Video Games: This reviewer writes from a parent’s perspective, prioritizing their children’s enjoyment and the family-friendly appeal of video game products. Their brief, enthusiastic endorsements aim to reassure other caregivers that a purchase will delight kids and enhance shared playtime, rather than offering technical or critical analysis. The motivation is primarily to celebrate products that successfully engage their children and to pass that positive reassurance on to like-minded parents.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a practical, family-oriented parent whose reviews focus on how well products entertain or function for their child and household. They test items personally, detail both positives and faults, and share balanced, experience-based feedback to help other parents avoid unreliable purchases. Their motivation centers on everyday utility and reliability rather than technical depth or bargain hunting.

category_characteristics.Software: This user reviews apps through the lens of a parent seeking engaging, kid-friendly content that keeps a young child happily occupied. Their motivation is primarily their child's enjoyment and the practical benefit of reliable entertainment, leading them to write brief, enthusiastic endorsements highlighting how well the product satisfies those needs. The tone suggests they value simplicity and emotional impact over technical detail, aiming to reassure other parents looking for similar solutions.
category_characteristics.Video Games: This reviewer is pragmatic and reliability-focused, testing a product thoroughly across multiple devices before forming an opinion. They aim to give balanced, useful feedback by noting both comfort and possible manufacturing defects, indicating a motivation to help others gauge real-world functionality and build quality.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This reviewer is a parent-centered evaluator who assesses products through the lens of their children’s engagement, learning load, and replay longevity. They offer concrete gameplay details—pacing, required reading, task structure—to help other parents gauge suitability and value before purchasing. Their motivation is to give a balanced, experience-based guide that protects family time and money by flagging both short-lived fun and practical limitations.

AGHEXJHPKFNZDCB5TK223XH25D5A.product_description: Product Description Wii Remote Controller Amazon.com To make gaming as accessible to people of all ages and all abilities, Nintendo wanted to create a controller that was as inviting as it was sophisticated- the result is the Wii Remote. Nintendo fused the global familiarity of a remote control with the sophistication of motion-sensing technology to come up with an input device that differentiates the Wii from any other console that has come before it. Revolutionary control Sporting the dimensions of a small traditional remote control, the wireless Wii Remote is a multifunctional device that is limited only by the game designer's imagination. The magic of the Wii Remote's design lies within; acellerometers inside the controller body measure movement in all directions and at all speeds. In a tennis game, it serves as your racket as you swing your arm for a long forehand or a quick and hard backhand. In a 4x4 driving game it serves as a steering wheel, allowing you to swerve to avoid obstacles or pickup power-ups. In first-person shooters, the Wii Remote acts as a firearm that you can point directly at an on-screen enemy. The list of potential uses is enormous, and the light weight of the Wii Remote allows gamers to play for hours without feeling fatigued. The Wii Remote boasts impressive technology for such a compact package. All Wii Remote buttons are accessible and responsive. View larger . Control many games from up to 30 feet away. View larger . The motion sensing technology is neatly tucked away within the Wii Remote body. View larger . The remote feels comfortable in both right and left hands. View larger . As comfortable as it is functional The Wii Remote is equally comfortable in right and left hands and houses just the right number of buttons for gaming- not so many that new players will get confused, but enough so that Wii games don't feel constrained. On the face of the remote are the D (or "plus") pad, a large "A" button which is used for major on-screen actions, and two small options buttons. Between the game buttons are a plus and minus buttons (which often act as "forwards" and "back"), as well as a "Home" button to engage the Wii home screen to change settings or check remote battery levels. On the back side of the controller is a trigger-like "B" button, perfect for timing releases of a bowling roll in Wii Sports . Thankfully, battery life is excellent with the two included AA batteries, just as with the previous generation of Nintendo wireless controllers. Immersive intelligence Along the bottom of the Wii Remote, four blue LED lights indicate which player position the remote is currently set to. The controller automatically connects to the Wii console via Bluetooth wireless technology. Below the LEDs, an expansion port lets you connect a number of devices including the Nunchuck and Classic controllers for Virtual Console gaming (Virtual Console games and controller accessories sold separately). Other features of the Wii Remote include adjustable rumble force-feedback and a reinforced wrist strap to ensure safe use. A speaker inside the remote gives the player feedback about the strength of swings or the accuracy of their moves- such as realistic tennis noises as the "racket" connects with the ball in Wii Sports . Overall, the physical design of the remote is extremely sturdy and of very high quality, ensuring countless hours of Wii gaming fun!
AGHEXJHPKFNZDCB5TK223XH25D5A.review_text: All of our wii controllers and remotes have held up and proved to be durable and do take a beating with the little ones playing.
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity

AGHEXJHPKFNZDCB5TK223XH25D5A.review_text: It works well as expected and has held up with 6 children playing it over time. Duration is a good thing.
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity

AGHEXJHPKFNZDCB5TK223XH25D5A.product_description: Product description MODEL- RVLAFW VENDOR- NINTENDO FEATURES- Wii Nunchuk Controller Contoured to perfectly fit a players hand, the Nunchuk controller builds on the simplicity of the Wii Remote controller and goes an extra step to meet the needs of gamers. The Nunchuk controller connects to the Wii Remote controller at its expansion port and is used in conjunction with the Wii Remote controller. The Nunchuk controller contains the same motion-sensing technology enabled in the Wii Remote controller but also includes an analog stick to assist in character movement. In several games, players will use the analog stick of the Nunchuk controller to move their characters and the Wii Remote controller to perform a specific action, whether thats throwing a pass in football or aiming a ranged weapon in an action game. Along with the analog stick, the motion-sensing Nunchuk controller also contains two buttons positioned for quick access. Because the Wii Remote and Nunchuk controllers are only relatively dependent on each other, players are free to hold them in whichever hand is most comfortable. The ambidextrous nature of the Wii controllers grants accessibility seldom seen in game controllers. MANUFACTURER WARRANTY:andnbsp;andnbsp;12 Months Amazon.com The Wii Nunchuk controller is a secondary controller that adds even more innovation to the next generation of gaming, and does it all with less physical movement. Used in conjunction with the standard Wii remote, certain games need the Nunchuk controller for additional control options. Contoured perfectly to fit a player's hand, The Wii Nunchuk (left) connects directly to the Wii remote. View larger . the Nunchuk controller builds on the simplicity of the Wii Remote controller. The Nunchuk contains the same three-axis motion sensor found in the Wii Remote, but also includes an analog stick, and two buttons to help assist in character movement. Many games will allow you to control your character's movement with the Nunchuk in your left hand, while your right hand is free to execute the action movements with the Wii Remote. For example, the Nunchuk is particularly useful for games like Wii Boxing. You can use the Nunchuk to punch with your weaker hand, while you use the Wii remote to punch and jab with your predominant hand. Take the fun to the next level with two-handed control of your games. View larger . In first-person shooters, the Nunchuk controller carries the burden of movement, freeing you to aim and fire using a more natural motion with the Wii Remote. In a football game, you can make your quarterback elusive with the Nunchuk controller while you search for an open receiver to throw to using the Wii Remote. Serious gamers may even want to use two Nunchuk controllers to gain a fierce competitive edge. Because the Wii Remote and Nunchuk controllers are only relatively dependent on each other, players are free to hold them in whichever hand is most comfortable. Perfectly suitable for either right or left-hand use, the Wii Nunchuk controller grants accessibility not often seen in previous game controllers. Also, the Nunchuk controller doesn't need its own power--it plugs into the Wii Remote controller when it's in use. So there's no need to worry about charging or replacing expensive batteries. Adding a Nunchuk to your Wii system will definitely help you open the doors to the next level of gaming, and seriously step up performance. Just be careful not to knock out your significant other, or bruise the dog, severely, while using one, or two Nunchuk controllers.
AGHEXJHPKFNZDCB5TK223XH25D5A.review_text: THis also has held up and still continues to work well as it is now several years old, has proved durable.

AGFNBDP3MQFVDKL2C4YDWJUWZ7JQ.product_description: When you play Guitar Hero Live iOS, you are the rock star. The Guitar Hero franchise has been reinvented by FreeStyleGames with brand new gameplay modes and a fresh, new guitar controller. In Guitar Hero Live you will now see the game in a new first-person view so you can feel the energy of the crowd as you rock out. Run through an epic playlist as you go from a small club all the way to the main stage of a huge festival as you work your way up. Just download the free app and experience Guitar Hero like you never have before with Guitar Hero Live!
AGFNBDP3MQFVDKL2C4YDWJUWZ7JQ.review_text: Really fun for a family game. Glad we got this for the xbox.

AGFNBDP3MQFVDKL2C4YDWJUWZ7JQ.product_description: Product Description Frozen in our world. Alive in theirs. Thousands of years ago, the Skylanders Giants fought epic battles in Skylands but were banished to Earth. With a new threat looming, it's time to bring them back to join forces with the Skylanders. Only you can put them on the Portal of Power to unleash their strength in the ultimate battle to save Skylands. Amazon.com Thousands of years ago, the Skylanders Giants fought epic battles in Skylands, but have long since been banished to Earth. Return to Skylands   Are you ready?   Join the Skylanders Synopsis Now, Kaos is back and with a new threat rising, it's time to bring the Giants back to join forces with the Skylanders. It's up to you to put them on the Portal of Power and unleash their strength. Are you ready for the ultimate battle to save Skylands? Travel to Skylands with this Skylanders: Giants Starter Pack. Join forces with the Giants with this Starter Pack that takes you to Skylands to engage in the ultimate battle. The Starter Pack includes the Skylanders Giants video game and plenty of other cool items, like a Portal of Power, three Skylanders figures, a character collector poster, three sticker sheets with secret codes and three trading cards. Are you ready to face Kaos? Key Features: Includes Skylanders Giants video game, Portal of Power, three Skylanders figures, a character collector poster, three sticker sheets with secret codes and three trading cards Includes Skylanders Giants video game, Portal of Power, three Skylanders figures, a character collector poster, three sticker sheets with secret codes and three trading cards Bring the Skylanders Giants back from banishment to join the Skylanders once again in this Starter Pack Bring the Skylanders Giants back from banishment to join the Skylanders once again in this Starter Pack Unleash the power of the Skylanders Giants with the Portal of Power Unleash the power of the Skylanders Giants with the Portal of Power Battle Kaos in an epic battle to save Skyland Battle Kaos in an epic battle to save Skyland Wii vs. Wii U: The Wii and WiiU use the same portal. They are completely compatible in every way except for the software. The Wii software will work on the WiiU (though the game won't be in HD if they play with Wii software), but the Wii U software will not work on the Wii. Toys will work on both platforms.
AGFNBDP3MQFVDKL2C4YDWJUWZ7JQ.review_text: One of my boys got the giants game, for wii, for a birthday. It was the game only (he already had a portal from another game), so he needed the characters. It was cheaper to buy this ps3 portal owners set, which was marked way down, than it was to buy just the characters. We gave the ps3 game to one of my husband's coworkers who wanted it, and the characters worked perfectly.
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity

AGFNBDP3MQFVDKL2C4YDWJUWZ7JQ.product_description: "Born to Burn!" says Eruptor. For generations, the Skylanders have used their magical powers and weapons to protect Skylands. But now, an evil tyrant has frozen them and banished them to Earth. Only you can put them on the Portal of Power and bring them to life to save Skylands once again. Collect and build the ultimate army of Skylanders Giants! Each Skylander Giant has their own unique powers and abilities to enhance your game play experience and save Skylands again. Bring your Skylanders Giants to life by placing them on the Portal of Power!  Eruptor is a hot head with a strong dislike for anything evil, so whenever something bad threatens his world, he quickly erupts, quite literally. He never shies away from speaking his mind. Eruptor also has a case of indigestion, prone to burping up a pool of molten lava whenever he feels nauseous or startled. Eruptor is a force of nature, hailing from a species that lived deep in the underground of a floating volcanic island until a massive eruption launched their entire civilization to the surface. He's a complete hot head -- steaming, fuming, and quite literally erupting over almost anything. To help control his temper, he likes to relax in lava pools, particularly because there are no crowds. Skylanders Lightcore Giants light up when near or on the Portal of Power Each Skylander Pack includes - Skylander figure, trading card, sticker sheet, and web code
AGFNBDP3MQFVDKL2C4YDWJUWZ7JQ.review_text: Great, very happy kiddo and works with xbox and wii games.

AESWZGOSDDULZ2TWG6GLDEU2X5JA.product_description: TALK WORKS controller charger compatible with Nintendo Switch and Switch OLED conveniently charges multiple controllers at the same time in one stand, with 4 Joy-Con charger slots and one Nintendo Switch pro controller stand slot. View the charging status of each controller with the easy-to-read light labels - red for charging and green for charged. This fast charger station simultaneously charges four Joy-Con controllers and one pro controller. For more hours of play, this charger dock for Nintendo Switch is easy to power from your console dock or any USB power port. For your convenience, a 5ft USB-C to USB cable is included. This docking station has five charging slots to charge multiple controllers so the whole family is ready to play for hours of entertainment - an ideal complement to your Nintendo Switch accessories. Additional accessories for Nintendo Switch by TALK WORKS include a case, screen protector, comfort grip controller, travel carrying case, Joy-Con charging dock, cables, steering wheels, and tennis rackets.
AESWZGOSDDULZ2TWG6GLDEU2X5JA.review_text: The station works well to charge Switch controls and looks reasonably well.  Keeps remoted organized.  If it lasts, I'd be quite happy with it

AG3R5PFEA7CDDNYYJ3YLGRIR4E2A.product_description: Control a real-life Mario Kart with Nintendo Switch and watch it come to life in the game. Race a real-world Mario Kart through your home. Use the Nintendo Switch system to control your kart and watch as it reacts to what's happening in the game as you boost and drift to victory. Your in-home course comes to life on-screen with a view from right behind the driver's seat. Turn your home into a Mario Kart course of your design Place gates and customize courses in the real world, then see them come alive with different in-game environments like jungles and snowscapes and obstacles like Piranha Plants. Use objects from around the house to customize your courses, then watch the game, transform your home into the Mario Kart world. Zoom around the house with up to three friends Bring along some friends to race around your custom course in Custom Race or Grand Prix! Just make sure each player has their own Nintendo Switch system, the Mario Kart Live: Home Circuit game and a Mario kart or Luigi kart. The magic of augmented of reality doesn't just mean you'll see your course and opponents come alive on screen. Hit a boost in the game? Watch as your real-life Mario Kart speeds up. Get hit by a Green Shell? Look out, because your kart will slow down! If you're worried about straying too far from the course, Smart Steering will help guide you along. The races you progress through in Grand Prix mode are varied-the windy environment might push your kart to the side, while the in-game Piranha Plant gate will bite you if you pass the wrong side. As you play, you'll unlock more speed settings, costumes, and more. These can all be used to create your custom course. Even Rainbow Road makes an appearance! Custom course materials not included. Additional games, systems and karts required for multiplayer mode. Systems and karts sold separately. Game download required and available as a free download on Nintendo eShop. Nintendo Switch Lite plays all games that support handheld mode.
AG3R5PFEA7CDDNYYJ3YLGRIR4E2A.review_text: My 7 year old absolutely loves this! Technology as come so far. Turns you home into Mario Cart!

AHO4DJZABJPL3HV3N6LQ74I5RU6Q.product_description: Guaranteed quality: EJGAME provide 12-Month Worry-Free Warranty and Unconditional 30-Day Refund & Free Lifetime Technical
AHO4DJZABJPL3HV3N6LQ74I5RU6Q.review_text:
These feel and look exactly as I anticipated. I have had no controller drift so far and no problems using them.

One of the things I really like about these is that they came with extra wires so I can charge all four of my controllers at the same time.

These fit onto the switch well and when I dock the switch I do not experience any problems. I also had no problems pairing them with the switch.

One thing that I found was that these were a bit bulky. This might be a good thing for someone with a bigger hand. I found that the bulk made a difference in the feel while playing with these controllers.
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity

AF27W4R5MFVLOEQ5FA6MUBKTKMMA.product_description: Tackle, pass, and score in battle soccer with the Mushroom Kingdom gang Introducing Strike, a 5-on-5, soccer-like sport with no rules—do whatever it takes to win! Get gritty and try to score the most goals by tackling enemies and pulling off score-boosting Hyper Strikes. Super Mario series mainstays like Peach, Toad, and Yoshi put their cleats (and stats) to the pitch and will stop at nothing to score…even if it means getting a little rough. Take the carnage online* or pass the ball to players locally**—just look out for the electric fence. Gear up and power up Tear up the field to earn coins and redeem them for stylish-and-sturdy gear. Don these accessories to customize your characters’ stats and appearance. Give your dribblers a speed boost or bump up your shooting skills for scoring. Mix it up to match your strategy. You’ll also find items on the field like Shells and Bananas—use ‘em to trip up your opponents to steal the ball or score. Team up with Strikers near and far, or join an online club to push and shove your way up the ranks 8 players can go for the goal on one Nintendo Switch system, with local wireless**, or online*. Bring along a secondary Striker on the same system in online battles, too. Locally, 4 players on each team can go cleat-to-cleat in individual matches. With Strikers Clubs, band together with up to 20 Strikers online* and compete against other clubs for points. Find the right club for you, team up with friends, and bring your own Striker style to the table. Redeem in-game tokens for goals, accessories, and more to customize your club’s stadium! *Any Nintendo Switch Online membership (sold separately) and Nintendo Account required for online features. Not available in all countries. Internet access required for online features. Terms apply. **Additional games, systems and/or accessories may be required for multiplayer mode. Games, systems and some accessories sold separately.
AF27W4R5MFVLOEQ5FA6MUBKTKMMA.review_text: My kids play soccer and I decided to pick this up for them.  We all enjoy playing it together as a family.  Sometimes the AI is ridiculous, but overall it is a fun game to play with the kids!

AFFLIFQUN3XPGV2CSQMXWXRFSOKA.product_description: When a mysterious and powerful vortex suddenly appears in various LEGO worlds, different characters from DC Comics, The Lord of the Rings and The LEGO Movie are swept away. To save their friends, Batman, Gandalf and Wyldstyle bravely jump into the vortex and quickly find themselves fighting to save all of LEGO humanity. Let creativity be the guide to a building and gaming adventure - journey through unexpected worlds and team-up with unlikely allies on the quest to defeat the evil Lord Vortech. Play with different from different worlds together in one LEGO videogame, and use each other's vehicles and gadgets in a way never before possible. LEGO Bad Cop driving the DeLorean Time Machine. Why not?! The LEGO Ninja go Masters of Spinjitsu fighting alongside Wonder Woman...yes, please! Get ready to break the rules, because the only rule with LEGO Dimensions is that there are no rules.  The LEGO DIMENSIONS Starter Pack has everything you need to set out on epic mash-up adventures filled with iconic worlds and unlikely allies as you’ve never seen them before. Build the minifigure heroes and fire-up the game to start the experience, then follow the in-game build instructions to assemble the loose bricks into the LEGO Gateway, and place the structure on the LEGO Toy Pad. There’s a whole multiverse of puzzles to solve, and challenges and enemies to face, and when you’re ready for more, collect level, team & fun packs to expand your collection. Use whatever minifigure with whichever vehicle or gadget – go ahead… break the rules!
AFFLIFQUN3XPGV2CSQMXWXRFSOKA.review_text: We loved this game on the XBOX 360 but we never really use that console so I bought the PS4 version. I was a little bummed I had to buy an entire new starter pack to get the game console but good old microsoft doesn't like to share so I had to. It was worth it though. The kiddo loves legos and it's a really fun ever expanding game to play

AFJERCY6R5F7AORDVWDEZRG6SEJQ.product_description: Product Description Kinect for Xbox 360 brings games and entertainment to life in extraordinary new ways with no controller required. Simply step in front of the sensor and Kinect recognizes you and responds to your gestures. Connecting in a whole new way is as easy as a wave of your hand. Kinect removes the last barrier between you and the experiences you love. Best of all, Kinect works with every Xbox 360 console. From the Manufacturer Product Description Kinect brings games and entertainment to life in extraordinary newways – no controller required. Easy to use and instantly fun, Kinect gets everyone off the couch moving, laughing and cheering. See a ball? Kickit. Control an HD movie with a wave of the hand. Want to join a friend in the fun? Simply jump in. With Kinect technology evaporates, letting the natural magic in all of us shine. And the best part is Kinect works with every Xbox 360 right out of the box*. What's in The Box? Kinect Sensor Kinect Sensor Power Supply Cable Power Supply Cable Kinect Adventures Game Kinect Adventures Game Manual Manual Product Features Array of 4 microphones supporting single speaker voice recognition Array of 4 microphones supporting single speaker voice recognition Depth Camera 640x480 pixel resolution @30FPS Depth Camera 640x480 pixel resolution @30FPS Color VGA Motion Camera 640x480 pixel resolution @30FPS Color VGA Motion Camera 640x480 pixel resolution @30FPS Fully compatible with all Xbox 360 models* Fully compatible with all Xbox 360 models* Revolutionary technology that includes body recognition Revolutionary technology that includes body recognition About Kinect Adventures Game (Included in the box) Publisher: Microsoft Game Studios Developer: Good Science Studio Format: DVD compatible with Kinect for the Xbox 360 video game and entertainment system ESRB Rating: “E” for Everyone Developer Information: Good Science Studio, formerly code-named “Spawnpoint,” is a Microsoft Game Studio game development studio founded in 2009 by a combination of industry veterans and creative newcomers. “Kinect Adventures” is the first title from Good Science. Float in outer space. Experience the thrill of roaring rapids. Tackle mountain top obstacle courses. And dive into the deep to explore a leaky underwater observatory — all from your living room. With “Kinect Adventures,” you are the controller as you jump, dodge and kick your way through exciting adventures set in a variety of exotic locations. What else you need to play Kinect: Xbox 360 4GB Console Xbox 360 4GB Console Room to Play (6ft between you and the sensor)* Room to Play (6ft between you and the sensor)* You! You! * Xbox LIVE Gold membership required for online multiplayer and Video Kinect. 190 MB of storage required; subject to change with system updates. Play space will vary with sensor placement and other factors.

AFKDXWXTNQYE2C4VR3P26KAJD2WA.review_text: This doesn't work in my controllers for some reason (I tried in two separate controllers). But it could just be a fault connection or something on this particular one that I was shipped. It clipped in easily, though. And feels really comfortable. Just sucks it didn't work.

AGHZR2XKKUPWBXZNAJDYHHNVUG7A.product_description: My Baby (NSW) - Nintendo SwitchTime to become a parent. The first title in the My Universe collection, My Baby allows you to take care of your own newborn boy or girl. Keep them happy and help them learn new skills. Choose your next action depending on your baby’s mood: feed them, bathe them, change their diapers, play together like in real life. Every action contributes to your baby’s happiness and love for you. Use all items at your disposal (toys, plushies, etc.) to motivate them to carry out new actions, such as standing, crawling, and walking - your efforts are rewarded. The more skills your baby learns, the more clothes, items, and unique badges you will earn to personalize your experience.My Universe: Puppies and Kittens - Nintendo SwitchAdopt a New Companion! Adopt a kitten, puppy, or even both! Your small, furry friend is waiting for you to take them home and give them love. Help them grow by taking care of them daily and educate them properly so they can grow to be well-trained pets. Don't forget to give them lots of cuddles and play with them often! Each animal is unique and has its own personality and preferences, so listen to your animal and their needs and they will give back to you by becoming the most loyal friend! You can even teach your pet tricks and train them to enter competitions to unlock rewards and new accessories. Explore your neighborhood to find little treasures, visit the meadow or the dog park to train and play with your furry friends, or go to the store to buy new items. Meet other pets while walking your pet so they can make four-legged friends to play with and get advice from other owners to raise your puppy well.
AGHZR2XKKUPWBXZNAJDYHHNVUG7A.review_text: My 8yo daughter revived this game as a Christmas gift. My 9yo son and 11yo daughter also liked playing it. There is a lot of reading and loading in this game making game play slow. It is only 1 player. You have to complete 12 tasks for the baby to “age” a month. When the baby turns 3 the “doctor” who has been telling you what to do tells you she is leaving, the credits role and then you can play how you want but are limited to everything but the exercise. My kids didn’t like this so they started a “new” game and started the process over. So short lived and slow. But they enjoyed it for about 3 weeks.
